semantic.role: Centralized version definition module for ArchSpine schema and package versioning.
responsibilities: Defines the SchemaVersion type alias as a semantic version string template.
Exports constants for the current package, schema, and config schema versions.
Exports a generator version string identifying the ArchSpine toolchain.
Provides a type guard function to validate config schema version compatibility.
outOfScope: Runtime version management or dynamic version resolution.
Schema validation beyond version string equality.
invariants: All exported version constants are string literals or template literals.
SchemaVersion type is a semantic version string template literal.
isSupportedConfigSchemaVersion is a pure type guard.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide immutable version constants and type safety for schema versioning across the ArchSpine system.
